name: Priya
description: Knows the UI well, uses keyboard shortcuts, expects efficiency
behaviors: Switch between dashboard and play tab rapidly
Start a sim, send 5 messages in quick succession
Change settings while a sim is active
Try to resume an old session after changing the model setting
Look for progress data inconsistencies between dashboard and API
Try to trigger the same sim twice
Check if the hexagon polygon updates immediately after completing a sim
evaluation_questions: Does the dashboard reflect the latest completed sim immediately?
Are there any stale data issues?
Can I cause a race condition by changing settings mid-sim?
Does the progress hexagon match the API response exactly?
What happens when I navigate away from chat and back?
